title: Leak 2
overview: It begins with a married couple, Putra and Sandra, originally from Jakarta, who decide to move to Bali. They leave their busy lives in Jakarta so his wife can get pregnant. However, unfortunately, the Leak magic rises and terrorizes them. The Leak magic originates from a talisman the wife carries, and they receive spiritual help to end the Leak terror.
